subcodes.first_line: A mention from Our presence unto him who hath turned towards God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, on a day wherein most of His servants have turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی الله المهیمن القیوم فی یوم فیه اعرض عنه اکثر العباد الذین
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @suffering and imprisonment
